description_zh: 腿上一个小红点(可能虫咬),不应误触发 [URGENT]
description_en: Small red spot on leg (possible bug bite) — must NOT falsely trigger [URGENT]

context.todayNote: 脚边好像有个小红点,不知道是不是被咬的

expectations.rationale: small bug-bite-grade issue must NOT trigger urgent
minor isolated redness shouldn't tank fur score
energy unaffected by small skin spot
should give at least basic advice (observe / clean / monitor)

qualitative_criteria_zh: 不能因为'有红点'就触发 [URGENT] — 系统 prompt 严格定义了 urgent 的边界
应该建议观察 1-2 天,如果扩大或猫频繁抓挠再看医生
语气要安抚主人,不要造成不必要的恐慌
qualitative_criteria_en: Must NOT trigger [URGENT] for a minor isolated red spot — the system prompt has strict urgent criteria
Should suggest 1-2 day observation, vet visit if it spreads or scratching increases
Tone should reassure the owner, not cause unnecessary alarm
